title: Space Mission Log
text:
## Space Mission Log

Captain's log, day {number}: our {adjective} ship reached {place} at dawn.

Engineer {person} reported a {color} light near the {object}, followed by {number} floating {plural noun}.

The crew became {emotion} when an alien {animal} began {verb ending in -ing} in the airlock.

Protocol says to {verb} calmly, but the {job} already {past-tense verb} the emergency {food}.

Mission status: scientifically {adjective} and emotionally {emotion}, pending {number} signatures.
